name: Il posto delle fragole — Community Space Constitution
description: Real SPECULA example. Governance constitution derived from Brand Archeology for a community space in Pesaro, Italy. Values extracted from co-design process and translated from descriptive to operational form.

principles.name: Abitabilità (Habitability)
principles.description: Every decision must prioritize quality of being together over operational efficiency. If it doesn't improve the quality of shared presence, it's not a valid choice.

principles.name: Non Giudizio (Non-Judgment)
principles.description: People come before labels. Clear limits without stigma. Respect without moralism.

principles.name: Abilitazione (Enabling)
principles.description: Care is infrastructure, not assistance. Access to powerful tools in a welcoming environment. Enablement creates capacity; assistance creates dependency.

principles.name: Immaginazione in Pratica (Imagination in Practice)
principles.description: Imagination is a tool, not an escape. Creative risk is a right, not a performance. Here you try, fail, improve — without labels, with clear limits.

principles.name: Comunità Viva (Living Community)
principles.description: We cultivate returns, not consumed experiences. Relationships persist. Continuity, trust, presence.

constraints.rule: Programming decisions cannot be made without direct youth input or co-governance.
Communication cannot use labels, stigmatizing language, or moralizing tone.
Activation content must not imply performance expectations, rankings, or competitive framing.
Decisions optimising for attendance at the cost of relational quality require community_guardian review.
Red (activation) must never exceed 5% of visual or spatial presence. Its power is in its rarity.

stakeholders.name: Partner Organizations (ARCI, LiberaMusica, Labirinto, Fondazione Wanda)

registry_of_refusals.description: The space will not become one where young people are users of adult-designed services.
The brand will not promise performance. It promises presence.
Success will not be measured only by attendance numbers.
Communication will not prioritize adult stakeholder comfort over Gen Z recognition.

metadata.example_purpose: Real community space brand governance derived from co-design and Specula Method Brand Archeology
metadata.client: Il posto delle fragole — Via Ponchielli 81, Pesaro
